name: TSPLIB
description: Standard benchmark instances for the Traveling Salesman Problem and related routing problems. Contains 144 TSP instances from 14 to 85,900 cities.

name: MIPLIB 2017
description: Mixed Integer Programming Library — the standard benchmark set for MIP solvers. Contains 1065 instances from real-world and academic problems.

name: CVRPLIB
description: Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem Library. Best known solutions and instance generators for CVRP variants.

name: OR-Library
description: J.E. Beasley's classic collection of test instances for OR problems including bin packing, set covering, vehicle routing, and more.

name: PSPLIB
description: Project Scheduling Problem Library — benchmark instances for resource-constrained project scheduling (RCPSP) and variants.

name: DIMACS Challenges
description: Series of implementation challenges for graph problems, shortest paths, max flow, graph coloring, and Steiner trees.

name: QAPLIB
description: Quadratic Assignment Problem Library — benchmark instances for facility layout and location problems.

name: SATLIB
description: Satisfiability benchmark library with structured and random instances for SAT solvers.

name: Nurse Rostering Datasets
description: International Nurse Rostering Competition benchmark instances (INRC-I and INRC-II).

name: Solomon VRPTW Instances
description: Classical benchmark instances for the Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows. 56 instances in 6 categories (C1, C2, R1, R2, RC1, RC2).

name: MINLPLIB
description: Mixed-Integer Nonlinear Programming Library — benchmark instances for MINLP solvers.

name: Mittelmann Benchmarks
description: Hans Mittelmann's decision tree for optimization software — comprehensive solver benchmarks updated regularly.
